title: Wikstroemia calcicola
taxonomy: Wikstroemia calcicola is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. It is a member of the genus Wikstroemia, which comprises a group of flowering plants native to the Pacific Islands and Asia. The classification of Wikstroemia calcicola is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, followed by the clade Angiosperms, and then the subclass Dilleniidae. This plant is also classified under the order Thymelaeales, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the thyme-leaved snaper family. The species Wikstroemia calcicola is a part of the class Magnoliopsida, which is a group of flowering plants that have two cotyledons in their seedlings.
